key_insights.insight: Knowing where you come from and understanding your roots is a key part of personal identity and growth.
key_insights.quote: I think one of the key things you need from knowing your dad is knowing where you come from.

key_insights.insight: Confidence doesn't need to come across as arrogance; humility can co-exist with self-assurance.
key_insights.quote: Look, you don't have to be a dickhead, you know, when you're, you know, when you're confident. Doesn't have to come across that way.

key_insights.insight: Fighting for your creative vision, even when facing resistance, is crucial for the integrity and quality of your art.
key_insights.quote: I think the process of pushing back and fighting for what you're believing always…without doing that I don't think we would have got to where we got to.

key_insights.insight: True success is measured not by the destination, but by the experiences, relationships, and memories created along the journey.
key_insights.quote: The best parts of what I've achieved has been along the way… the people I've met, the fun I've had doing things, the filming, the memories…

key_insights.insight: Success can be a distraction from dealing with personal flaws and issues; sitting with your thoughts is necessary for growth.
key_insights.quote: It stripped a bit of me away and I became a civilian...I just had to be Ashley and actually sit with my thoughts and deal with my flaws.

key_insights.insight: It's important to connect with others and seek external perspectives, as the voice in your head can be biased and lead to poor decisions.
key_insights.quote: I don't believe anyone should listen to voices in their head if I'm honest with you...You should always have someone to bounce something off.

key_insights.insight: Forgiving others, even those who have wronged you, is a liberating act that primarily benefits yourself.
key_insights.quote: If you can forgive the people that hurt me, right? Do you forgive everybody in your life? I don't think I've got round to forgiving everyone. I think I do carry a lot of baggage, but I'm working on it.

key_insights.insight: The process of pushing back and fighting for what you believe in will often lead to a better outcome.
key_insights.quote: I wouldn't say necessarily that we won but I think the process of pushing back and fighting for what you're believing always…without doing that I don't think we would have got to where we got to.

actionable_advice.advice: When facing a tough decision, seek external perspectives from trusted individuals instead of relying solely on your own thoughts.
actionable_advice.how_to: When confronted with a difficult decision, reach out to family, friends, or mentors to discuss the situation and gain alternative viewpoints before making a final decision.

actionable_advice.advice: If you are having trouble communicating with a loved one, consider going to therapy together.
actionable_advice.how_to: There are many different types of couples therapy available, find one that will help you build new ways of communicating.

memorable_stories: Story of Ashley's dad, dying of cancer, pushing to come see him on set in Canada, and how those last two weeks together changed his life.
The story of how his production company dissolved and the tapes with his father ended up with his former friend who he is now estranged from.
Story of childhood memories of his father, being chased by police, his mother never bad-mouthing his father despite his shortcomings, and the mixed feelings towards his father as a role model.
Anecdote of how when Ashley was locked down with his partner, and he realized they had problems communicating, and they were fighting a lot.
contrarian_claims: The voice in your head is a mug and not to be trusted; external counsel is almost always needed.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Ashley Walters (Top Boy): "Me & Kano Didn't Have The Greatest Time!". The Unheard TRUTH About Top Boy, Career Rejection & Personal Grief!
